languages.text: {n}Себериан, совладав с потрясением, чуть склоняет изуродованную голову.{/n} "Вижу, встреча с проклятым Тразином не прошла бесследно для нас обоих, {name}. Настанет время, и он сполна вернет все то, что задолжал династии. Пока же примите мою благодарность. Нет сомнений, что вы фон Валанциус, ибо даже среди лживых иллюзий ксеноса совершили верный выбор, поддержав сенешаля Войгтвир".

traits.locale_text: {n}Себериан, совладав с потрясением, чуть склоняет изуродованную голову.{/n} "Вижу, встреча с проклятым Тразином не прошла бесследно для нас обоих, {name}. Настанет время, и он сполна вернет все то, что задолжал династии. Пока же примите мою благодарность. Нет сомнений, что вы фон Валанциус, ибо даже среди лживых иллюзий ксеноса совершили верный выбор, поддержав сенешаля Войгтвир".

languages.text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and inclines his mutilated head slightly.{/n} "I see that our encounter with the accursed Trazyn has left its mark upon us both, {name}. The hour will come when he repays in full all that he owes the dynasty. Until then, accept my gratitude. There is no doubt that you are a von Valancius, for even amidst the xenos's lying illusions, you made the right choice in supporting Seneschal Voigtvir."

languages.text: {n}Seberian supera la conmoción e inclina ligeramente su mutilada cabeza.{/n} «Veo que nuestro encuentro con el maldito Trazyn nos ha dejado huella a ambos, {name}. Llegará el momento en el que pague su deuda con la dinastía. Hasta entonces, acepte mi agradecimiento. No cabe duda de que es de sangre von Valancius, ya que, incluso en medio de las embusteras ilusiones xenos, tomó la decisión correcta y apoyó a la Senescal Voigtvir».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and inclines his mutilated head slightly.{/n} "I see that our encounter with the accursed Trazyn has left its mark upon us both, {name}. The hour will come when he repays in full all that he owes the dynasty. Until then, accept my gratitude. There is no doubt that you are a von Valancius, for even amidst the xenos's lying illusions, you made the right choice in supporting Seneschal Voigtvir."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian supera la conmoción e inclina ligeramente su mutilada cabeza.{/n} «Veo que nuestro encuentro con el maldito Trazyn nos ha dejado huella a ambos, {name}. Llegará el momento en el que pague su deuda con la dinastía. Hasta entonces, acepte mi agradecimiento. No cabe duda de que es de sangre von Valancius, ya que, incluso en medio de las embusteras ilusiones xenos, tomó la decisión correcta y apoyó a la Senescal Voigtvir».

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安压下震惊，微微歪了歪他那残缺的头颅。{/n}“看来与那个该死的特拉金相遇之后，你我身上都留下了伤痕，{name}。总有一天，他欠这个王朝的一切会连本带利地还清。在此之前，请接受我的谢意。毫无疑问，你是冯·瓦兰修斯家的人，因为即使身处异形那充满谎言的幻象之中，你依然做出了正确的选择，站在了维特威尔总领那一边。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and inclines his mutilated head slightly.{/n} "I see that our encounter with the accursed Trazyn has left its mark upon us both, {name}. The hour will come when he repays in full all that he owes the dynasty. Until then, accept my gratitude. There is no doubt that you are a von Valancius, for even amidst the xenos's lying illusions, you made the right choice in supporting Seneschal Voigtvir."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安压下震惊，微微歪了歪他那残缺的头颅。{/n}“看来与那个该死的特拉金相遇之后，你我身上都留下了伤痕，{name}。总有一天，他欠这个王朝的一切会连本带利地还清。在此之前，请接受我的谢意。毫无疑问，你是冯·瓦兰修斯家的人，因为即使身处异形那充满谎言的幻象之中，你依然做出了正确的选择，站在了维特威尔总领那一边。”

languages.text: {n}Sous le choc, Seberian tâche de se maîtriser et incline légèrement sa tête mutilée.{/n} « Je vois que notre rencontre avec l'infâme Trazyn nous a tous deux marqués de son empreinte, {name}. L'heure viendra où il remboursera intégralement sa dette envers la dynastie. En attendant, je vous remercie. Vous êtes {mf|un|une} authentique von Valancius, cela ne fait aucun doute, car même {mf|cerné|cernée} par les illusions mensongères du xénos, vous avez pris la bonne décision en soutenant la sénéchale Voigtvir. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and inclines his mutilated head slightly.{/n} "I see that our encounter with the accursed Trazyn has left its mark upon us both, {name}. The hour will come when he repays in full all that he owes the dynasty. Until then, accept my gratitude. There is no doubt that you are a von Valancius, for even amidst the xenos's lying illusions, you made the right choice in supporting Seneschal Voigtvir."

L'heure viendra où il remboursera intégralement sa dette envers la dynastie. En attendant, je vous remercie. Vous êtes {mf|un|une} authentique von Valancius, cela ne fait aucun doute, car même {mf|cerné|cernée} par les illusions mensongères du xénos, vous avez pris la bonne décision en soutenant la sénéchale Voigtvir. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian, şoku üzerinden atıp sakatlanmış başını hafifçe eğiyor.{/n} "Görüyorum ki kahrolasıca Trazyn ile karşılaşmamız, ikimiz üzerinde de iz bırakmış {name}. Hanedanlığa olan borcunu tamamen ödeyeceği vakit gelecek. O zamana kadar minnettarlığımı kabul et. Von Valancius olduğuna şüphe yok. Zenonun yalan illüzyonlarının ortasında bile Seneşal Voigtvir'i destekleyerek doğru seçimi yaptın."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and inclines his mutilated head slightly.{/n} "I see that our encounter with the accursed Trazyn has left its mark upon us both, {name}. The hour will come when he repays in full all that he owes the dynasty. Until then, accept my gratitude. There is no doubt that you are a von Valancius, for even amidst the xenos's lying illusions, you made the right choice in supporting Seneschal Voigtvir."

Hanedanlığa olan borcunu tamamen ödeyeceği vakit gelecek. O zamana kadar minnettarlığımı kabul et. Von Valancius olduğuna şüphe yok. Zenonun yalan illüzyonlarının ortasında bile Seneşal Voigtvir'i destekleyerek doğru seçimi yaptın."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンはショックを乗り越え、傷ついた頭をわずかに傾げた。{/n}「 呪われたトラズンとの遭遇が、私たち両方に傷跡を残したことを、私は知っている、{name}。彼は、その王朝に負うべきものをすべて返済する時が来るだろう。その日まで、私の感謝を受け取れ。あなたは間違いなくフォン・ヴァランシウスである。異星人の嘘の幻影の中であっても、ヴォイストヴィル執事の支援を選択したからだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and inclines his mutilated head slightly.{/n} "I see that our encounter with the accursed Trazyn has left its mark upon us both, {name}. The hour will come when he repays in full all that he owes the dynasty. Until then, accept my gratitude. There is no doubt that you are a von Valancius, for even amidst the xenos's lying illusions, you made the right choice in supporting Seneschal Voigtvir."

languages.text: {n}Seberian überwindet seinen Schock und hebt seinen verstümmelten Kopf.{/n} "Wie ich sehe, hat unsere Begegnung mit dem verfluchten Trazyn Spuren hinterlassen, {name}. Der Tag wird kommen, an dem er für alles aufkommen wird, was er der Dynastie schuldet. Bis es so weit ist, vielen Dank. Es besteht kein Zweifel, dass Ihr {mf|ein|eine} von Valancius seid, denn Ihr habt trotz der Illusionen des Xenos die richtige Entscheidung getroffen und Truchsessin Voigtvir unterstützt."
